name: Premium Generated Button v1
description: An interactive button component showcasing a unique hover effect and micro-interaction transition state, variation 1.
code:
<button class="gen-btn-v1">Hover Me 1</button>
<style>
.gen-btn-v1 {
  padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #ffffff;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00adb5 0%, #393e46 100%);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.gen-btn-v1:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 173, 181, 0.4);
}
</style>
